{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323141303733765C1E97250C662C6"}"},"total":938},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617338233456247614","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常喜欢这本书 是真的群像 女主无敌强 朋友们也无敌强 最喜欢的是阖家团圆 只要进了女主的基地就没有一个人死去 终于不是那种老套的“生活终于好起来了但我却不幸地离开了孩子” 女主也不会让任何一个心术不正的人住进来 不需要天天处理鸡毛蒜皮的租客吵架偷窃等杂事 租客们都是善良可爱的人 坏人直接抹杀 真正的桃花源 喜欢大家都好好地活着开心地活着 看小说就是要幸福开心૮(˶ᵔᵕᵔ˶)ა
女主的一路升级打怪也不会无趣 非常好看 好看到里面的所有租客小角色我都记得名字和经历 就是完结太快了 还想多看几百章[哭]
如果作者出了书 我一定会买"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773552818,"group_id":"7478626528645893144","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N97kfxAYm2+Cm0ZB3cbgpEi+ou/tVL2EG6pRH5ikAkwk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/264d6a5d103946a79b9fcbe7b056504c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788022&x-signature=mtld8GAQGf7HlsrE9X2NUVbMPWM%3D","user_id":"4336080489824103","user_name":"预备役富婆🤑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4336080489824103","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7478626528645893144","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+经营+治愈+基建+无cp+微群像】
一睁眼，顾念穿进炼狱级末世。
丧尸横行、植物变异、天灾接连不断，她开局就被陷害，还差点领了盒饭。
濒死之际，顾念绑定酒店经营系统，还融合了神秘的植物图鉴，当起末世酒店小老板。
【叮！成功接待一位客人，获得一级晶核×1！】
【恭喜您，成功培育可食用南瓜*1，奖励南瓜土豆浓汤菜谱！】
【食用效果：浓郁的南瓜汤会让您的身体变得暖暖的哦～注：可持续时间2h。】
当别人在寒蚀期冻成冰雕，她的客人在泡玫瑰温泉，品着带增益效果的梅花酿。
炎荒期热浪滚滚，酒店里清爽冷饮排起长队。
黑潮期，暴雨笼罩大地，餐厅飘出麻辣海鲜大杂烩的诱人香气…
随着酒店升级，解锁更多的特色建筑。
精神冥想室能激活精神体！
无限实战的全息模拟训练室、让人身临其境的全息电影院…
启明酒店成了最大的基地，希望的星火重燃。
直到顾念开启了一份神秘奖励，才缓缓揭开末世的真相…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/17aaece94089cdc621fa306a6fc9fa98","author":"沐予","author_id":"","book_id":"7478626528645893144","book_name":"末世怎么了？我的酒店能升级","book_short_name":"末世回档计划","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0d0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7478641687095427608","read_count":"11126","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"771287"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"365","tags":"科幻末世,系统,末世,无CP,大佬,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ea5c25145954c18cc17520dba68da53e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430383&x-signature=CP7%2B1QaasvHqNzuyIcuCeuwh5XM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110866947165","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"280"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323141303733765C1E97250C662C6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读25小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"l 群像塑造的都很棒，逻辑通，部分段落带动情感，看这本书很痛快。
顾念太强了，也太完美，甚至有点神性，但是又不缺乏人性的真善美，看作者写的很舒服。
我不觉得这本书在9.4分以下，我认为应该起码9.6。
整体节奏恰到好处，不过还是希望作者有空的话，写多多番外，或者开本顾念后面航行的故事[送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761062517,"group_id":"7478626528645893144","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3a09ObHRvrNZV7UkcbsW4Abt54mzWFu55Ptc2fI7FsR","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1412207085901240","user_name":"爱吃火锅鱼的千面帝影"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1412207085901240","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7478626528645893144","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+经营+治愈+基建+无cp+微群像】
